title: Quantum consistency per generation
statement: Anomaly cancellation and spin-statistics hold per generation (legacy Math49c-v3 hypothesis promotion); CP structure and unitarity completion remain open.
scope: CLOSED@PER-GENERATION for anomaly + spin-statistics; CP and unitarity excluded and gated.
falsifier: A per-generation anomaly sum failing on re-validation, or a spin-statistics counterexample in the stated class.
no_overclaim: Full quantum consistency including CP and unitarity.
next_action: Scope the CP/unitarity completion as fresh claims; migrate Math49c-v3.
